issues.fix: Add at least one of implements / function_model_refs / cycle_model_refs / fsm_refs / register_refs / dataflow_refs.

outputs: Single-outstanding APB-controlled DMA copy engine with 32-bit source/destination addresses and memory read/write streaming handshakes.
side_effects: updates only SSOT-declared state, status, counters, events, interrupts, buffers, or output handoff state
issues.fix: Convert prose outputs/side_effects into executable output_rules or state_updates. Use output_rules with name, expr, width, and port for externally visible outputs; use state_updates with name, expr, and width for architectural state changes.
